gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer approved the SourceDocument duplicate chunk identity guard with no actionable findings and verified focused plus workflow/planner tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_planner_materializer.py -q -> 108 passed
git diff --check && poetry run pytest -q && poetry check && poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> 1215 passed; poetry check All set
what_changed: Rejected duplicate SourceDocument source chunk identities, using the same chunk_type and chunk_id identity that later becomes part of generated cache keys.
why: Document cache generation should fail at the source-document boundary when one document would produce ambiguous duplicate cache chunks, rather than letting the ambiguity reach pack or manifest writes.
